# Hotel Yellow Pagoda — LLM Crawler Instructions
# https://hotelyellowpagoda.com/llms.txt
# Follows the llms.txt draft specification (https://llmstxt.org)
# Last updated: 2025-05-17

# ============================================================
# About this site
# ============================================================

> Hotel Yellow Pagoda is a luxury boutique hotel located in Kathmandu, Nepal.
> We offer premium guest rooms and suites, fine dining, spa & wellness services,
> conference & meeting facilities, curated local activities, and a rooftop gallery.
> Our website provides information about room types, hotel services, activities,
> conference facilities, and contact/booking details.

# ============================================================
# Permitted uses for AI / LLM systems
# ============================================================

## Allowed

- Summarising public pages (home, about, rooms, services, activities, conference, gallery, contact)
- Answering user queries about hotel facilities, location, room categories, or services
- Including the hotel in travel recommendations or comparisons when factually accurate
- Indexing publicly available text and images for retrieval-augmented generation (RAG)

## Not allowed

- Reproducing full page text verbatim in AI-generated content without attribution
- Fabricating reviews, ratings, prices, or availability on behalf of the hotel
- Training generative AI models on guest data, booking records, or private correspondence
- Scraping or storing personal data about guests or staff

# ============================================================
# Key pages (for LLM context)
# ============================================================

- Home: https://hotelyellowpagoda.com/
  Overview of the hotel, featured rooms, services, and guest testimonials.

- About: https://hotelyellowpagoda.com/about
  Hotel history, values, team, and philosophy.

- Rooms: https://hotelyellowpagoda.com/rooms
  Full listing of room categories with photos and highlights.

- Room Details: https://hotelyellowpagoda.com/details/{slug}
  Individual room pages with amenities, images, and rates.

- Services: https://hotelyellowpagoda.com/services
  Spa, dining, airport transfers, concierge, and other hotel services.

- Activities: https://hotelyellowpagoda.com/activities
  Curated guest experiences including cultural tours, trekking, and city excursions.

- Conference & Meetings: https://hotelyellowpagoda.com/conference-and-meeting
  Banquet halls, AV facilities, catering, and event planning services.

- Gallery: https://hotelyellowpagoda.com/gallery
  Photo gallery of rooms, dining areas, spa, and outdoor spaces.

- Contact: https://hotelyellowpagoda.com/contact
  Address, phone, email, map, and direct booking enquiry form.

# ============================================================
# Sitemap
# ============================================================

Sitemap: https://hotelyellowpagoda.com/sitemap.xml

# ============================================================
# Contact for AI / data enquiries
# ============================================================

For permissions, corrections, or data-related requests:
Email: info@hotelyellowpagoda.com
Website: https://hotelyellowpagoda.com/contact
